role.description: lead = primary decision maker, maintainer = regular active, contributor = occasional, bot = automated

status.description: active = evidence of activity in the past year

evidence.description: One sentence: what data supports this classification

disclosure_channel.description: Best channel for reporting a vulnerability: SECURITY.md email, GitHub Security Advisories, registry contact, or direct email. Empty if no clear channel found.

notes.description: Anything notable: bus factor concerns, recent maintainer turnover, corporate backing, etc.
